session.returning: Taking you back to sign in...

payment.title: Payments
payment.subtitle: Send to a username or pay many people at once.
payment.processingPrivate: Shielding this transfer from public activity and explorer references at the application layer.
payment.processingPublic: Publishing your transfer to Keeta testnet.
payment.privateDescription: Private transactions are shielded at the application layer.
payment.publicDescription: Public transactions are visible at the application layer.
payment.privateResult: Visible only inside KeetaPay for the sender and recipient.
payment.publicConfirmed: Payment confirmed and added to the live feed.

withdraw.title: Withdraw from @{username}
withdraw.description: Send KTA to a Keeta wallet address outside KeetaPay.
withdraw.processing: Sending KTA to the recipient wallet address.
withdraw.successDescription: Returning to your dashboard in 2 seconds.
withdraw.verifiedDescription: Your Keeta SDK certificate state is attached to the withdrawal record.

landing.headline: Send verified crypto payments.
landing.subtitle: KeetaPay lets you move crypto with verified @usernames and SDK-backed identity checks.

features.transferDescription: Search verified @usernames, add KTA, and tap send. The feed stays lively.
features.identityDescription: Wallets, certificates, and transfers run through the Keeta SDK.
features.accessDescription: Email, Google, and Twitter/X sessions with SDK identity checks.
features.checksDescription: Usernames resolve to Keeta certificates with verified status.
features.trustDescription: Make verified transfers feel social, polished, and simple.

how.title: How it works
how.description: Login, verify identity, claim a wallet, and pay socially.

steps.1: Secure login powered by Privy authentication
steps.2: SDK certificate issued for every KeetaPay wallet
steps.3: Sensitive wallet keys are stored securely and never exposed
steps.4: Verified usernames replace complex wallet addresses
steps.6: Transfers are signed with the encrypted user wallet
steps.7: Transactions are processed on Keeta testnet
steps.8: SDK verification keeps profile trust transparent

cta.title: Launch verified payments fast.
cta.description: Sign in, verify identity, and start sending KTA.

landing.footer: Built for the Keeta Coding Challenge.

onboarding.title: Claim your @name
onboarding.description: Your Keeta wallet is created behind the scenes. Your friends only need this username.
onboarding.hint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, or underscore.

transactions.title: Transaction history
transactions.description: Every KTA payment sent or received by your KeetaPay username.

requests.title: Receive KTA with a link.
requests.description: Generate an expiring KeetaPay link with your username locked in. The payer can edit the amount before sending without needing your wallet address.
requests.copiedDescription: The link was copied to your clipboard.

paymentLink.expiredDescription: Ask the recipient to generate a new KeetaPay link.
paymentLink.signInDescription: Privy verifies your session. KeetaPay sends the KTA transfer from your Keeta wallet.

settings.usernameCheck: Username availability is checked before saving.
settings.signInDescription: Link email, Google, and X to the same KeetaPay account.
settings.methodsNote: These methods resolve to the same account, keeping your Keeta username, wallet, and transaction history together.

activity.empty: No transactions yet. Send the first one.

profile.payDescription: Start a secure transfer from your dashboard with this recipient already selected.

system.privyInstructions: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_PRIVY_APP_ID to frontend/.env.local, then restart the frontend server. Privy is used only for login and sessions.
